# sakura_webaccel_activation (Resource)

Manages a WebAccel activation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sakura_webaccel_activation" "foobar" {
  site_id = "webaccel-site-id" # e.g. sakura_webaccel.foobar.id
  enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the WebAccel activation is enabled or not.
- `site_id` (String) The site ID of WebAccel.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the WebAccel Activation.
